families: MarketHistory: use market history signals available at runtime to choose an adaptive but simple ZI-style shade. Return (shade, 1).
MarketState: use market state signals available at runtime to choose an adaptive but simple ZI-style shade. Return (shade, 1).
PrivateValue: use private value signals available at runtime to choose an adaptive but simple ZI-style shade. Return (shade, 1).
MarketHistoryAndState: use market history and state signals available at runtime to choose an adaptive but simple ZI-style shade. Return (shade, 1).
MarketHistoryAndPrivateValue: use market history and private value signals available at runtime to choose an adaptive but simple ZI-style shade. Return (shade, 1).
